item.title: The HTML Review: Issue 05 摘要
item.description:
The author expresses frustration with modern web design, contrasting it with the artistic integrity of native app developers. They reference recent critiques of web bloat and link to The HTML Review's latest issue, suggesting a longing for simpler, more purposeful web development akin to traditional craftsmanship.
标签: web design, frustration, native apps, artistic integrity, HTML Review, web bloat, development, craftsmanship, critique, simplicity

item.title: From the DF Archive, a Decade Ago: ‘The Industry Is Fucked Up’ 摘要
item.description:
This article references a 2015 post by Rene Ritchie from iMore, which detailed how the site was serving increasingly poor and reader-hostile ads. It notes that the state of web advertising has seen little improvement over the past decade, and iMore, once a highly regarded site, is now defunct. The piece highlights the persistent issues in the web ad industry and the decline of a once-great publication.
标签: web, advertising, media, blogging, industry, decline, reader-experience, publishing, digital-media, history

item.title: WWDC 2026: June 8–12 摘要
item.description:
Apple's WWDC 2026 will take place from June 8 to 12, starting with a keynote and Platforms State of the Union. The online conference includes over 100 video sessions, interactive labs, and appointments for developers to connect with Apple engineers. It will be accessible via the Apple Developer app, website, YouTube, and for the first time, on Bilibili in China. A lottery system is available for in-person keynote attendance.
标签: Apple, WWDC, developer conference, keynote, online event, Bilibili, software development, tech announcement, Apple Developer, China

item.title: Quoting David Abram 摘要
item.description:
The author argues that LLMs cannot replace the core craft of software development, which involves understanding complex systems, debugging, architectural design, and making strategic decisions. While AI can assist with code generation and boilerplate, it lacks context, true understanding, and the ability to choose what to build. The real value of a developer lies in knowing what should exist and why, a responsibility that remains human.
标签: careers, AI, LLM, software development, programming, AI-assisted programming, generative AI, craft, decision-making, architecture

item.title: Gasoline Prices Around the World 摘要
item.description:
The article highlights a single-purpose website that displays gasoline prices around the world, noting the author's surprise at the high cost of gas in Hong Kong. It references a link to DaringFireball's coverage of global fuel prices, emphasizing the utility of focused, niche websites for specific data.
标签: gasoline, prices, Hong Kong, single-purpose website, data visualization, global, fuel, economics, niche, DaringFireball
